channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Missouri lawmakers are going after voter-approved abortion rights. Voters will likely reelect them
item.description: JEFFERSON CITY, Mo. (AP) — Voters in Missouri last election approved a constitutional amendment that promised to undo the state's near-total abortion ban.
item.dc:creator: SUMMER BALLENTINE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: TikTok goes dark as U.S. ban takes effect
item.description: TikTok users were not able to watch videos on the popular social media platform on Saturday evening, just hours before a federal ban on the service was set to take effect.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Travis Kelce makes NFL history in first game of three-peat quest
item.description: Once again, Travis Kelce has broken a record at Arrowhead Stadium after catching a pass from Patrick Mahomes.
item.dc:creator: Dillon Seckington, KREX 5

item.title: Eggs are about to get even more expensive, expert says. Here's how much
item.description: Eggs are nearly 40% more expensive now than they were a year ago, the Labor Department said this week. It's about to get even worse, one expert says.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, KTLA 5

item.title: Trump says he will ‘most likely’ will give TikTok 90-day extension
item.description: President-elect Trump told NBC News on Saturday that he will likely give TikTok a 90-day extension while his incoming administration assesses the situation following the Supreme Court decision to uphold a federal ban.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, KTLA 5

item.title: Extreme cold forecast for much of US in coming days
item.description: BISMARCK, N.D. (AP) — Another blast of winter weather is expected in parts of the U.S. in the coming days, including bone-chilling wind in the Northern Plains and unusual snow and ice in the Gulf Coast area. Cold weather forecasted for Monday for Washington, D.C.
item.dc:creator: JACK DURA and JULIE WALKER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: WATCH: Stray dog brings sick, freezing puppy to vet's office
item.description: A stray dog was caught on camera carrying her sick puppy to the front door of a veterinarian clinic in Turkey earlier this week.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, KRON4

item.title: How to build a budget to help you save in 2025
item.description: NewsNation spoke with a financial expert about how to build a budget that could help you start the year off with less financial stress.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Soriano, NewsNation

item.title: Private college students in ‘To Catch a Predator’ TikTok trend targeting Army soldier plead not guilty
item.description: Six Assumption University students face charges after allegedly luring an Army soldier, 22, to their campus to confront him and film the encounter, according to court documents.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Live updates: Trump inauguration weekend commences as protesters rally in Washington
item.description: Inauguration festivities will begin in full force Saturday as President-elect Trump and his allies — and protesters — arrive in Washington ahead of Monday's inauguration of the 47th president of the U.S.
item.dc:creator: The Hill Staff, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Where to turn when a natural disaster upends your finances
item.description: Here’s how you can get help and be strategic with your resources as you begin to rebuild after a disaster.
item.dc:creator: Laura McMullen, Fox 5

item.title: Georgia appeals court sides with Trump in affirming dismissal of 6 state charges
item.description: A Georgia appeals court on Friday affirmed the dismissal of six counts in the state's 2020 election interference against President-elect Trump and his allies, upholding a trial judge's decision that the charges must be thrown out due to a lack of detail.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, WGN 9

item.title: College students accused of online 'catch a predator' plot appear in court
item.description: Six Assumption University students were in court to face charges in a connection made between a Holyoke woman and a man on Tinder, which resulted in a TikTok plot to confront a falsely accused sexual predator.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Shook, NewsNation

item.title: Wisdom of a California grandmother, 90, goes viral amid Eaton Fire tragedy
item.description: A nearly 90-year-old California woman who lost her home to the Eaton Fire is going viral for pragmatism and positivity in the face of so much adversity.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Tunnel used to smuggle migrants, weapons located near El Paso
item.description: A tunnel that has been used for a year is used to smuggle migrants, weapons and cash across the U.S.-Mexico border.
item.dc:creator: Ali Bradley, NewsNation

item.title: Judges hand down what could be the last punishments for the Jan. 6 riot before pardons from Trump
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The federal judge who oversaw Donald Trump's 2020 election interference case denounced efforts to rewrite the history of the U.S. Capitol attack Friday as she handed down what she acknowledged may be one of the final punishments for the Jan.
item.dc:creator: ALANNA DURKIN RICHER and MICHAEL KUNZELMAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Sealy Mattress company is sued after Georgia man was found dead inside a locked trailer
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — A Georgia man suffering a mental health crisis wandered into a Sealy Mattress facility, and his body was found locked inside the back of a truck there about a week later, his family says in a wrongful death lawsuit filed this week.
item.dc:creator: JEFF MARTIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Ramaswamy plans run for Ohio governor
item.description: Vivek Ramaswamy, the co-chair of President-elect Trump's new Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), plans to run for governor of Ohio, two sources confirmed to The Hill on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Julia Mueller, Fox 5

item.title: Trump inauguration moved indoors because of freezing temperatures
item.description: President-elect Trump’s inauguration ceremony is being moved indoors because of expected bitter cold Monday in Washington, D.C. Trump and Vice President-elect JD Vance are expected to be sworn in inside the Capitol Rotunda rather than on the West Front of the Capitol.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Supreme Court gives green light to law that could ban TikTok
item.description: WASHINGTON — The Supreme Court on Friday delivered a blow to TikTok by upholding a law that could potentially lead to the video-sharing social media platform being banned in the United States.
item.dc:creator: Lawrence Hurley and Kat Tenbarge, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Mud, debris slide splits hillside home that survived Palisades Fire in half
item.description: A hillside home overlooking the Pacific Ocean that survived the devastating Palisades Fire has split in half from a landslide directly behind the property.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Southern California native paid off mortgage day before Eaton Fire consumed home
item.description: While those displaced by the Eaton and Palisades fires are still reeling from the loss of their homes and, in some cases, loved ones, many of them say they’re being victimized yet again by price-gouging landlords.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, KRON4

item.title: Armed L.A. residents defy evacuation orders to defend homes from wildfire looters
item.description: Amid concerns over looters targeting wildfire victims’ homes, some residents are defying evacuation orders and choosing to protect their properties instead.
item.dc:creator: Vivian Chow, KRON4

item.title: Official portraits of Donald Trump, JD Vance are released
item.description: Not waiting until after his inauguration, on Thursday President-elect Trump gave the country a look at what he says are the official portraits of himself and Vice President JD Vance.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, Fox 5

item.title: David Lynch, director of 'Twin Peaks,' 'Blue Velvet' and more, dies at 78, family says
item.description: David Lynch, the filmmaker and director behind such movies as “Eraserhead,” “Blue Velvet” and the TV series “Twin Peaks,” has died, his family announced in a message posted to his official Facebook page.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, ABC 4

item.title: Banning cellphones in schools gains popularity in red and blue states
item.description: LITTLE ROCK, Ark. (AP) — Arkansas' Republican Gov. Sarah Huckabee Sanders and California's Democratic Gov.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DeMILLO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Bob Uecker, colorful comedian and Baseball Hall of Famer, dies
item.description: From his time as a backup catcher to appearances on Johnny Carson's late night show to his more than five decades in the broadcast booth, people far and wide knew Bob Uecker.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: TikTok CEO attending Trump inauguration
item.description: TikTok CEO Shou Zi Chew will attend President-elect Donald Trump's inauguration next week, one day after a potential ban of the video-sharing platform could take effect in the U.S., according to a source familiar with the plans.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, KRON4

item.title: WATCH: Girls basketball coach accused of hitting person with car after argument
item.description: A girls' youth basketball coach is accused of hitting a person with his vehicle after an argument following a game Saturday in Columbia, according to state police, and it was caught on surveillance video.
item.dc:creator: Jenn Brink, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Man sought after 'So I raped you' Facebook message being extradited to US
item.description: French Appeal Court prosecutors said an American man accused of sexually assaulting a Pennsylvania college student in 2013 and later sending her a Facebook message that said, “So I raped you," was being extradited Thursday to the United States.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 2025 Grammys to proceed with focus on wildfire relief. Here's what you can expect
item.description: The 2025 Grammy Awards are right around the corner, which means it is time to get those viewing party plans in action. Allow us to help.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Middle East latest: Netanyahu says Cabinet won't meet over ceasefire until Hamas drops new demands
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu’s office said Thursday his Cabinet won’t meet to approve the agreement for a ceasefire in the Gaza Strip and the release of dozens of hostages until Hamas backs down from what it called a “last minute crisis.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Windy, flame-fanning weather eases up as progress made on LA-area fires
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The windy, flame-fanning weather that put the nation's second most-populous metropolitan region on edge eased up Wednesday as firefighters made significant gains against the two massive wildfires burning around Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: JAIMIE DING, CHRISTOPHER WEBER and JULIE WATSON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Florida grandmother who left infant in hot car found not guilty of manslaughter
item.description: A Florida grandmother was acquitted of manslaughter in the death of her 7-month-old granddaughter, but was convicted on a lesser charge.
item.dc:creator: Staci DaSilva, WGN 9

item.title: Man gets 2 years in US prison for aiding pushy effort to get ex-official to return to China
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A man convicted in the first trial highlighting U.S. claims that China harasses its critics overseas was sentenced Wednesday to two years in prison for his role in a creepy campaign to get a former official to return to his homeland.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER PELTZ, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: What to know about the devastation from the Los Angeles-area fires
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — More than a week into what could be the costliest wildfires in U.S. history, weary and anxious Los Angeles-area residents were hoping for a favorable shift in the winds expected Thursday and an end to the constant fear that their lives might be further upended.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Montana House endorses transgender bathroom ban affecting fellow lawmakers
item.description: Montana’s Republican-controlled House on Wednesday endorsed a ban on transgender people using bathrooms in public buildings that do not align with their sex assigned at birth — a change that would complicate daily life for two fellow lawmakers.
item.dc:creator: HANNAH SCHOENBAUM, Associated Press, ABC 4
